description: Oriole with all black hood extending to "v" in front, orange belly, orange on back, distinct white wing bar, and orange shoulder patch. Orange outer tail coverts. Sharp, dark, slender billBehaviors: Bird was feeding at oranges and attempting to feed and compete with Bullock's Orioles. Appeared several times throughout the day. Each time it would either go to the feeder the Bullock's prefer and eat from oranges in a similar fashion, stretching to reach feeders, hanging with it's feet in some cases to eat oranges.Call: None heardPlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Polly Wren Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner
